# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="table" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="hidden"}]
        element ns=html local="tbody" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="tr" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="td" attrs=[]
              "x"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-table-form-start-tag
  tree-builder: in-table-hidden-input-start-tag
  tree-builder: in-table-anything-else-reprocess-in-body
  tree-builder: in-body-form-end-tag-pointer-not-in-scope
